user.title: Set up Tasmota IR Ready
user.description: Choose the kind of IR device you want to add.

climate.title: Set up IR Climate
climate.description: Enter the minimum details to connect to your AC. All other settings can be configured afterwards via the **Configure** button.

data_description.vendor: The IRHVAC vendor string, e.g. ELECTRA_AC, MITSUBISHI_AC, SAMSUNG_AC …
data_description.command_topic: Topic to publish IR commands to, e.g. cmnd/tasmota_ir/IRHVAC
data_description.state_topic: Topic to subscribe for AC state updates, e.g. tele/tasmota_ir/RESULT

media_player.title: Set up IR Media Player
media_player.description: Enter the Tasmota IRSend topic, IR protocol, bit count, and the hex data for each remote button.

data_description.command_topic: Topic to publish IRSend commands to, e.g. cmnd/tasmota_ir/IRSend
data_description.media_protocol: The protocol reported by Tasmota when decoding the remote, e.g. NEC, SONY, SAMSUNG.
data_description.media_bits: The bit length reported by Tasmota for this remote code.
data_description.media_power_data: Only the hex Data value, e.g. 0x20DF10EF. The integration builds the full IRSend JSON payload.
data_description.media_power_on_data: Only the hex Data value for discrete power on.
data_description.media_power_off_data: Only the hex Data value for discrete power off.

remote.title: Set up IR Remote
remote.description: Enter the Tasmota IRSend topic, IR protocol, bit count, and initial remote button hex data.

data_description.command_topic: Topic to publish IRSend commands to, e.g. cmnd/tasmota_ir/IRSend
data_description.media_protocol: The protocol reported by Tasmota when decoding the remote, e.g. NEC, SONY, SAMSUNG.
data_description.media_bits: The bit length reported by Tasmota for this remote code.

fan.title: Set up IR Fan
fan.description: Enter the Tasmota IRSend topic, IR protocol, and bit count. Speed presets and oscillation can be configured afterwards via the **Configure** button.

data_description.command_topic: Topic to publish IRSend commands to, e.g. cmnd/tasmota_ir/IRSend
data_description.media_protocol: The protocol reported by Tasmota when decoding the remote, e.g. NEC, SONY, SAMSUNG.
data_description.media_bits: The bit length reported by Tasmota for this remote code.

humidifier.title: Set up IR Humidifier
humidifier.description: Enter the Tasmota IRSend topic, IR protocol, and bit count. Operating modes can be configured afterwards via the **Configure** button.

data_description.command_topic: Topic to publish IRSend commands to, e.g. cmnd/tasmota_ir/IRSend
data_description.media_protocol: The protocol reported by Tasmota when decoding the remote, e.g. NEC, SONY, SAMSUNG.
data_description.media_bits: The bit length reported by Tasmota for this remote code.

abort.already_configured: This device (command topic) is already configured.

data_description.state_topic_2: Subscribe to a second topic, e.g. stat/tasmota_ir/RESULT alongside tele/
data_description.availability_topic: Leave blank to auto-derive from the command topic, e.g. tele/tasmota_ir/LWT
data_description.mqtt_delay: Delay before publishing — useful when grouping multiple devices
data_description.power_sensor: Binary/switch sensor that reflects the AC's physical power state

data_description.supported_modes: Select only the modes your AC remote supports
data_description.supported_fan_speeds: Select only the fan speeds your AC remote supports
data_description.supported_swing_list: Select swing options available on your AC. Use fixed positions (Highest/High/…) instead of auto sweep if your AC supports vane positioning
data_description.hvac_model: Leave at -1 for auto-detect, or enter the model number shown in Tasmota IRHVAC output

hvac_modes.name: Supported HVAC Modes
hvac_modes.description: Select only the modes your AC remote supports

fan_speeds.name: Supported Fan Speeds
fan_speeds.description: Select only the fan speeds your AC remote supports

swing_positions.name: Supported Swing Positions
swing_positions.description: Select swing options available on your AC. Use fixed positions (Highest/High/…) instead of auto sweep if your AC supports vane positioning

data_description.toggle_list: Each checked item creates a dedicated On/Off switch entity in Home Assistant
data_description.default_sleep_mode: Sleep timer value sent with every IR command. Use -1 to leave it off
data_description.default_swingv: Fixed vertical vane position sent when no swing mode is active
data_description.default_swingh: Fixed horizontal vane position sent when no swing mode is active
data_description.keep_mode_when_off: When off, still include the last active mode in the MQTT payload so the AC remembers it
data_description.ignore_off_temp: Do not update the target temperature from MQTT payloads received while the AC is off
data_description.special_mode: HVAC mode to report when the power sensor turns on unexpectedly (e.g. auto-clean)

data_description.learn_command: Select a command and click Submit to enter IR learning mode. The integration will subscribe to your Tasmota RESULT topic and fill the hex value when a button is pressed (30 s timeout).
data_description.command_topic: Topic to publish IRSend commands to, e.g. cmnd/tasmota_ir/IRSend
data_description.availability_topic: Leave blank to auto-derive from the command topic, e.g. tele/tasmota_ir/LWT
data_description.media_protocol: The protocol reported by Tasmota when decoding the remote, e.g. NEC, SONY, SAMSUNG.
data_description.media_bits: The bit length reported by Tasmota for this remote code.
data_description.media_power_data: Only the hex Data value, e.g. 0x20DF10EF. The integration builds the full IRSend JSON payload.

media_sources.name: Input Sources
media_sources.description:
**Direct mode:** fill in both the name and hex Data for each source.
**Cycle mode:** fill in only the source names (in cycle order) and the Cycle Button hex data — pressing the cycle button advances to the next source.

data_description.learn_command: Select a command and click Submit to enter IR learning mode. The integration will subscribe to your Tasmota RESULT topic and fill the hex value when a button is pressed (30 s timeout).
data_description.command_topic: Topic to publish IRSend commands to, e.g. cmnd/tasmota_ir/IRSend
data_description.availability_topic: Leave blank to auto-derive from the command topic, e.g. tele/tasmota_ir/LWT
data_description.media_protocol: The protocol reported by Tasmota when decoding the remote, e.g. NEC, SONY, SAMSUNG.
data_description.media_bits: The bit length reported by Tasmota for this remote code.
data_description.media_power_data: Only the hex Data value, e.g. 0x20DF10EF. The integration builds the full IRSend JSON payload.

remote_keypad.name: Remote Keypad
remote_keypad.description: These commands are sent through remote.send_command as digit_0 through digit_9. Aliases 0 through 9 also work.

remote_sources.name: Input Sources
remote_sources.description:
**Direct mode:** call `remote.send_command` with the source name — each name maps to its own IR code.
**Cycle mode:** call `remote.send_command` with a source name — the integration presses the cycle button the required number of times.

data_description.mqtt_delay: Delay before publishing — useful when grouping multiple IR devices to avoid simultaneous commands.
data_description.fan_power_sensor: Select a binary_sensor that reflects the fan's physical power state. When it changes, the HA entity state is updated immediately — overriding the optimistic IR command result.

fan_speeds.name: Speed Presets
fan_speeds.description: Define up to 6 named speed presets. Each name will appear as a preset mode in Home Assistant.

data_description.mqtt_delay: Delay before publishing — useful when grouping multiple IR devices to avoid simultaneous commands.
data_description.humidifier_humidity_sensor: Select any HA sensor that reports the current room humidity. Leave blank if you have no sensor.
data_description.humidifier_power_sensor: Select a binary_sensor that reflects the humidifier's physical power state. When it changes, the HA entity state is updated immediately — overriding the optimistic IR command result.

humidifier_modes.name: Operating Modes
humidifier_modes.description: Define up to 6 named operating modes. Each name will appear as a mode in Home Assistant.

humidifier_settings.name: Humidity Settings
humidifier_settings.description: Target humidity is stored optimistically in HA — no IR code is sent when you change it. Current humidity is read live from the chosen sensor. The step is stored as a diagnostic attribute (HA's humidifier UI always increments by 1%).

data_description.humidifier_min_humidity: Lower bound of the target humidity slider shown in the HA dashboard.
data_description.humidifier_max_humidity: Upper bound of the target humidity slider shown in the HA dashboard.
data_description.humidifier_humidity_step: Step used when incrementing/decrementing target humidity via automations or custom cards.

learn_ir.title: Learning IR Command
learn_ir.description:
Point your remote at the Tasmota IR receiver and press the **{command_name}** button.

Waiting up to 30 seconds…
